name: Foundations
blurb: Before there was a field, there were the ideas: that thought might be mechanized, that a machine could reason, learn, or be said to think at all.

name: Symbolic to Connectionist
blurb: AI swung between two poles: the symbolic camp that believed intelligence was manipulating symbols, and the connectionists who bet on networks of neuron-like units trained from data. Neither could yet deliver on its promises.

name: The Learning Revolution
blurb: Backpropagation gave neural networks a practical training algorithm, but it took decades of hardware, data and architectural innovation before deep learning reshaped science, commerce and everyday life.
